title: CameraCraft
description: CameraCraft adds a portable photo camera and fully controllable security cameras (CCTV) to Minecraft. Capture snapshots of your world, set up surveillance points, and monitor everything remotely from an in‑game PC for a clean, immersive tech experience.
body:
## CameraCraft
CameraCraft adds a complete photography and surveillance system to Minecraft. Capture images with a portable camera, store and share them, and set up fully controllable security cameras linked to an in‑game PC. Keep an eye on your base, monitor your farms from a distance, or simply take stunning shots of your world. Simple, immersive, and perfect for creative players and role‑players alike.

- Camera – Instantly take photos of your surroundings.
- Photo Paper – A consumable item required to take pictures.
- Video Cameras – Place cameras in your world and view their live feed (they do not record videos).
- Tripod – Set up your camera to create more immersive scenes.
- Computer – Allows you to view the images taken with the camera and access the video camera feeds.


_Dependencies
Requires TCTCore_
